seoTitle: Chelona vs Cherbourg — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chelona and Cherbourg. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chelona and Cherbourg.
heading: Chelona vs Cherbourg — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chelona, Queensland and Cherbourg, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cherbourg has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Chelona (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chelona or Cherbourg safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chelona has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Cherbourg scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chelona scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Cherbourg scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chelona or Cherbourg?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cherbourg has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
